# Zero-guesswork workflow

## Step 1: Choose the signal

```text
CTV / first-frame stop
EHR / hook hold
APV-CPL / retention
SAV / reusable value
SND / social transfer
CMT / participation
FOL / account promise
SEA / long-tail search
TRU / trust
```

## Step 2: Choose one hypothesis

Example:

```text
H091: result-first frame beats context-first frame.
```

## Step 3: Choose method

```text
M-MPT for same-body creative twins
M-FAC for factorial tests
M-TRI for Trial Reels cold-audience test
M-SGA for search growth assay
M-RPL for replication
```

## Step 4: Create variants

Only one major variable changes.

```text
A: face open
B: before/after open
C: visible mistake open
D: proof screenshot open
```

## Step 5: Pass quality gates

Any gate below threshold returns to rewrite.

## Step 6: Publish and route exposure

Organic first, controlled exposure if under threshold.

## Step 7: Read checkpoints

```text
24h: early diagnostic
72h: primary batch decision
7d: mechanism decision
30d: search/long-tail decision
```

## Step 8: Decide

```text
scale
replicate
rewrite
kill
```

## Step 9: Update memory

Record mechanism, result, and next variant.
